title: Adjacent leapfrog orbit pairs preserve the invariant

source.notes: This theorem lifts the one-step invariant to any adjacent pair of an indexed leapfrog orbit.

informal.statement: If a real-valued sequence x satisfies the scalar leapfrog recurrence, then for every index n, the invariant evaluated at (x_{n+2}, x_{n+1}) equals the invariant evaluated at (x_{n+1}, x_n).
informal.latex: Let \(x:\mathbb{N}\to\mathbb{R}\) satisfy \(x_{n+2}=2x_{n+1}-x_n-(\Delta t)^2\omega^2x_{n+1}\) for all \(n\), with \(\Delta t\ne 0\). Then \(I(x_{n+2},x_{n+1})=I(x_{n+1},x_n)\) for all \(n\).
assumptions: omega and dt are real numbers
x is a real-valued sequence indexed by natural numbers
x satisfies the scalar leapfrog recurrence
informal.expected_conclusion: The invariant is preserved from one adjacent orbit pair to the next.

declarations.name: leapfrogStep
declarations.statement: def leapfrogStep (omega dt x xPrev : ℝ) : ℝ := 2 * x - xPrev - dt ^ 2 * omega ^ 2 * x

declarations.name: leapfrogInvariant
declarations.statement: def leapfrogInvariant (omega dt x xPrev : ℝ) : ℝ := ((x - xPrev) / dt) ^ 2 + omega ^ 2 * x * xPrev

declarations.name: IsLeapfrogOrbit
declarations.statement: def IsLeapfrogOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (x : ℕ → ℝ) : Prop := ∀ n : ℕ, x (n + 2) = leapfrogStep omega dt (x (n + 1)) (x n)

declarations.name: leapfrogInvariant_step_of_isLeapfrogOrbit
declarations.statement: theorem leapfrogInvariant_step_of_isLeapfrogOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (hdt : dt ≠ 0) (x : ℕ → ℝ) (hx : IsLeapfrogOrbit omega dt x) (n : ℕ) : leapfrogInvariant omega dt (x (n + 2)) (x (n + 1)) = leapfrogInvariant omega dt (x (n + 1)) (x n)

tasks.input: Translate the adjacent-pair informal invariant statement into a Lean 4 theorem statement using IsLeapfrogOrbit.
tasks.target: theorem leapfrogInvariant_step_of_isLeapfrogOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (hdt : dt ≠ 0) (x : ℕ → ℝ) (hx : IsLeapfrogOrbit omega dt x) (n : ℕ) : leapfrogInvariant omega dt (x (n + 2)) (x (n + 1)) = leapfrogInvariant omega dt (x (n + 1)) (x n)

tasks.input: Given the one-step theorem and the orbit recurrence assumption, complete the proof.
tasks.target: A proof rewriting with hx n and applying leapfrogInvariant_preserved.
